title: TruFin Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report provides a detailed security audit of the TruStake smart contract, identifying a critical reentrancy vulnerability and offering a proof-of-concept code to demonstrate the exploit. The report also includes a recommendation to implement a reentrancy guard, which is a standard practice to prevent such attacks.
audit.improvements: The report could benefit from a more comprehensive analysis, including a detailed explanation of the reentrancy guard implementation and potential mitigation strategies for other vulnerabilities. Additionally, including test cases and further code snippets to demonstrate the recommended fixes would enhance the overall quality of the report.
